LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF PRECILA BALABBO UNOPPOSED MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. COUNSEL FOR THE PLAINTIFF IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING AND PROPOSED CONSENT JUDGMENT. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-05-2024 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-20-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF PRECILA BALABBO Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement and consent judgment" is granted.

Counsel for the plaintiff is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling and proposed consent judgment.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
